reviews.comment: The online portion was very thorough and easy to complete at my own pace. They were very flexible in setting up the hands on portion around my work schedule. The instructor for the hands on portion was very knowledgeable and helpful. I would definitely recommend Coastal Carolina CPR and will be using them again in the future.

reviewReply.comment: Keith, thank you for choosing CCC and for your recommendation! We're glad we could make it a positive experience for you.  Looking forward to working with you again.

reviews.comment: Even with a 40 year nursing career I always get stressed out with CPR testing. The instructor was very professional and knowledgeable. Upon arriving and introductions made, i immediately felt comfortable and the stress melted away. Highly recommend!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the feedback, Jackie.  Glad we were able to help!  Have a great weekend.
